establishContext() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ReaderManagement
Establish a context with the operating system Smart Card library, to start using the smart card functions
exportAuthCertificate() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.pki.PKIFacade
Export the Auth Certificate
exportSignCertificate() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.pki.PKIFacade
Export the Signing Certificate
extractATR() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.PCSCReader
extract the ATR from the current connected smart card, use getATR method to retrieve the ATR
